mapper.insert: insert into bc_user (id, username, email, tail_slug, password, headspanclass, headspan, headpath, meta, blogsite, date_joined, last_login, qq_openid, qq_info, is_del, wx_openid, wx_info) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tailSlug,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{headspanclass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{headspan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{headpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{meta,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{blogsite,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dateJoined,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastLogin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qqOpenid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qqInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{wxOpenid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wxInfo,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})
mapper.update: update bc_user set username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tail_slug = #{tailSlug,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, headspanclass = #{headspanclass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, headspan = #{headspan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, headpath = #{headpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, meta = #{meta,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, blogsite = #{blogsite,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, date_joined = #{dateJoined,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_login = #{lastLogin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qq_openid = #{qqOpenid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qq_info = #{qqInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_del = #{isDel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, wx_openid = #{wxOpenid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wx_info = #{wxInfo,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select id, username, email, tail_slug, password, headspanclass, headspan, headpath, meta, blogsite, date_joined, last_login, qq_openid, qq_info, is_del, wx_openid, wx_info from bc_user where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
select id, username, email, tail_slug, password, headspanclass, headspan, headpath, meta, blogsite, date_joined, last_login, qq_openid, qq_info, is_del, wx_openid, wx_info from bc_user
